description: Tumella Umbrella - Make you smile in the rain. Most umbrellas are boring and unreliable, break and spin with the slightest breeze. Sturdy umbrellas are too big and heavy and impossible to travel. Tumella brings you the best of both worlds, a small mini umbrella but extremely sturdy with unmatched wind protection. Carefully tested to withstand winds up to 70 km/h (hurricane strength). Our unique umbrella will last for years. We have added unique features and vibrant designs to give you an exceptional umbrella that is easy to carry and is there for you in moments when you need it most. Discover the unique features & benefits of the Tumella travel umbrella 1. SUPERIOR STABILITY - Nine unbreakable fiberglass ribs with new ultra flex technology 2023; 2. Waterproof and drip-proof Teflon coating to keep you and your surroundings dry. Tested and unparalleled wind protection. Portable and super easy to use with just one hand - comfortable even for children. Unique and vibrant designs to match your style and make you smile on a rainy day. Choose stunning images from floral to stellar. We are from the Netherlands, and Mother Nature taught us how to master the rain to bring you an umbrella for any occasion. Stay dry and smile with you in the rain Tumella.
